description_long: This is a British Rail InterCity electric locomotive, characterized by its streamlined body and distinctive livery with a black upper section, white lower section, and a yellow front. The locomotive features a pantograph on the roof for overhead electric power collection, as well as detailed rooftop equipment and vents. The sides display the 'INTERCITY' branding and a stylized swallow logo, with various access panels and technical markings. The front and rear ends are equipped with buffers and couplers, and the windows are arranged in a compact, functional pattern typical of locomotive cabs. The overall design is robust, with visible undercarriage components and a sleek, aerodynamic profile.
description: A British Rail InterCity electric locomotive with a black, white, and yellow livery, featuring a pantograph, detailed rooftop equipment, and 'INTERCITY' branding on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow cab face, headlights, and buffer details, with the pantograph and rooftop equipment visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full 'INTERCITY' branding, swallow logo, pantograph, and technical rooftop details.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back cab, rear lights, and undercarriage, with the roof equipment visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same branding and features as the other side, with clear visibility of the pantograph and rooftop components.
attribute_window_arrangement: small rectangular cab windows at each end
